artifacts.name: InstancedBricks
artifacts.description: Full InstancedMesh renderer for FR-PERF-001: one InstancedMesh per brick type, per-instance color via setColorAt, matrix updates on brick changes, geometry disposal on unmount

summary.work_completed: Implemented InstancedBricks.tsx replacing the stub with a full Three.js InstancedMesh renderer. One InstancedMesh per brick type (4 types = ≤4 draw calls). Pre-allocates 1000 instances per type (NFR-SCALE-001). Per-instance color via setColorAt avoids WebGL errors. Geometry disposed on unmount.
key_findings: One InstancedMesh per brick type achieves ≤4 draw calls regardless of brick count.
Pre-allocating MAX_INSTANCES=1000 avoids InstancedMesh recreation on brick add.
setColorAt() auto-creates instanceColor buffer — no manual buffer setup needed.
Zero-scale matrix hides unused instances without changing mesh.count.
Geometry disposal on unmount prevents WebGL memory leaks.

human_review_required.reason: Performance tests (T-FE-PERF-001-02, T-PERF-PERF-001-01) require real browser execution to validate FPS targets; human approval needed before merge

recommended_actions: Review PR for InstancedBricks.tsx implementation correctness.
Verify instanceColor buffer is properly set via setColorAt (no WebGL errors).
Confirm matrix updates cover both position and rotation.
Check geometry disposal useEffect is present.
Validate that tests in PR #39 (feature/15-instanced-mesh-tests) align with this implementation.
